title: 🔥宏观风险偏好仍低迷
body: 市场受制于流动性紧缩。BMRI录得77（RISK_OFF），确认当前处于风险厌恶模式。虽油价下跌或引发降息押注，但在美联储政策转向前，$80,682 难以有效突破。资金面紧绷限制了反弹高度，需警惕外部宏观变量冲击。中性。流动性何时转向？
body_en: Markets are constrained by liquidity tightening. BMRI prints 77 (RISK_OFF), confirming risk-off mode. Falling oil may fuel rate cut bets, but $80,682 is tough to crack before a Fed pivot. Tight liquidity caps the upside—watch for external macro shocks. Neutral. When does liquidity turn?
